judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue expansion and healthy margins, but currently unprofitable on a net basis and trading at a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 7.0%; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 33.5% YoY — indicating strong market adoption.
Gross margin 73.3% — demonstrates pricing power and efficient service delivery.
Free cash flow $755M TTM — positive cash generation despite net losses.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $234.18, suggesting upside potential.
negatives: Operating margin -9.7% and Profit margin -3.7% — the company is not yet profitable.
Forward P/E 137.78x and Price/Sales 31.90x — valuation is very high, priced for significant future growth.
Debt/Equity 230.86% — leverage is substantial, though offset by significant cash reserves.
Return on equity -5.9% and Return on assets -2.7% — current profitability metrics are negative.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines to provide context, traders should focus on Cloudflare's fundamentals and upcoming earnings. The company is scheduled to report its next quarterly results on July 30th. The market's reaction will likely hinge on whether growth estimates are met and management's outlook for the remainder of the year.

examples.body: $RBRK cyber getting a little euphoric now, $CRWD running hard into earnings is a little concerning. Might end up like $NET after earnings.
$NET Sell the news. 194 tomorrow buy the dip.
$NET we’re not gonna see the 100s again
$NET slow grind off lows gon turn into angry pump
